title: Weltgewebe open PR repair and dependency migration
goal: Track evidence-grounded repairs for open Weltgewebe pull requests that are unsafe or technically incomplete and therefore must not be merged as-is.
completion: PR #1404 satisfies deployment-drift and proxy-trust contracts on current main before merge.
PR #1411 migrates SHA-2 hashing output safely, passes the full Rust/API proof matrix and preserves hash semantics before merge.

metadata.safety_boundary: Do not merge a task source PR until its exact current head, full diff, required checks and self-review are green against current main.
